plugins.name: sdlc-skills
plugins.description: Full SDLC toolkit — all agents and skills in one install.

plugins.name: ba
plugins.description: Business analyst agent — turns vague ideas into user stories with acceptance criteria.

plugins.name: tech-lead
plugins.description: Tech lead agent — decomposes stories into dependency-ordered tasks, owns architecture decisions and code review.

plugins.name: project-manager
plugins.description: Project manager agent — routes tasks to developers, coordinates team progress, owns the merge gate.

plugins.name: python-dev
plugins.description: Python developer agent — implements Django, FastAPI, Flask services with TDD.

plugins.name: js-dev
plugins.description: JavaScript/TypeScript developer agent — React, Next.js, Node services with TDD.

plugins.name: qa-engineer
plugins.description: QA engineer agent — verifies features, reproduces bugs, writes E2E tests via Playwright.

plugins.name: scout
plugins.description: Codebase scout agent — maps unfamiliar repos, generates CLAUDE.md and project configuration.

plugins.name: personal-assistant
plugins.description: Personal assistant agent — email, calendar, Teams, notes, and daily briefings.

plugins.name: bugfix-workflow
plugins.description: End-to-end bugfix workflow: reproduce → root cause → fix → regression test.

plugins.name: plan-feature
plugins.description: Structured feature planning: requirements, investigation, feasibility, implementation plan.

plugins.name: implement-feature
plugins.description: Feature implementation workflow: plan review, tests, implementation, verification, delivery.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Structured code review for correctness, security, performance, and maintainability.

plugins.name: tdd
plugins.description: Test-driven development workflow — write tests first, then implement.

plugins.name: git-workflow
plugins.description: Git operations: branching, commits, PRs, rebasing, cherry-picks, releases.

plugins.name: browser-verify
plugins.description: Chrome DevTools Protocol browser automation — inspect, click, screenshot, verify UI.

plugins.name: playwright-testing
plugins.description: UI/E2E test automation with Playwright MCP.

plugins.name: issue-tracking
plugins.description: Create and manage issues in GitHub, Linear, or GitLab.

plugins.name: deep-research
plugins.description: Checkpointed research workflow — trend research, topic analysis, fact-checking.

plugins.name: context-gatherer
plugins.description: Cross-channel context gathering — local KB, email, Teams, web — before responding.

plugins.name: goal-verifier
plugins.description: Goal-backward verification — checks whether the desired outcome was actually achieved.

plugins.name: memory
plugins.description: Per-role persistent memory — facts, preferences, decisions, and daily log as plain markdown.

plugins.name: msgraph
plugins.description: Microsoft 365 integration — email, Teams, calendar, SharePoint via Graph API.

plugins.name: obsidian-vault
plugins.description: Headless Obsidian vault operations — create, search, and file notes without the app.

plugins.name: project-seeder
plugins.description: Generate AGENTS.md and .octobots/ project configuration after codebase exploration.

plugins.name: task-completion
plugins.description: Five-step task handoff protocol: commit → push → PR → comment → notify.
